questions.prompt: Put the SOC pipeline stages in order, from raw telemetry to a ticket on your desk.
items: Signals investigated (a SOC analyst takes a look)
Incidents reported (confirmed compromise, sent to the partner)
questions.explanation: Most events never become incidents. The SOC promotes what looks worth a human's attention into an investigation, and only the confirmed-malicious investigations become reports.

questions.prompt: An incident report can be resolved before its remediation plan has been reviewed and approved.
questions.explanation: A report with a remediation plan that hasn't been reviewed and approved is not eligible for resolution. Approve or acknowledge the plan first, then resolve.
